# tfe_registry_provider

Manages public and private providers in the private registry.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the provider.

### Optional

- `namespace` (String) The namespace of the provider. For private providers this is the same as the oraganization.
- `organization` (String) Name of the organization. If omitted, organization must be defined in the provider config.
- `registry_name` (String) Whether this is a publicly maintained provider or private. Must be either `public` or `private`.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The time when the provider was created.
- `id` (String) ID of the provider.
- `updated_at` (String) The time when the provider was last updated.
